case_title: ATLAS PROPERTY GROUP, INC. VS. MARKEESE BOOKER ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKER, MARKEESE , AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATLAS PROPERTY GROUP, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOOKER, MARKEESE , AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1335 FOLSOM STREET, UNIT NUMBER 101 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70713837)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLAS PROPERTY GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKER, MARKEESE , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70713837), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLAS PROPERTY GROUP, INC. SERVED JUL-31-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKER, MARKEESE , AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION / $68.33 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLAS PROPERTY GROUP, INC.
